refnamediv.refpurpose: performs D test of model comparaison for GMM

listitem.para: * ugmm = tlist result for unrestricted estimation
* rgmm = tlist result for restricted estimation
* np = 'noprint' if the user does not want to print the results

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Performs D test of model comparison for efficient GMM as proposed by Newey and West (1987).

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
